context: Tests whether WeatherKit guidance catches over-fetching, stale caching assumptions, alert optionality, attribution, and availability boundaries.

checklist.name: Selective queries
checklist.description: Recommends selective WeatherQuery requests such as current and alerts instead of fetching every dataset with weather(for:) for a narrow dashboard.

checklist.name: No appearance over-fetching
checklist.description: Rejects unconditional fetches on every view appearance and recommends a model, cache, refresh trigger, or location-keyed load strategy.

checklist.name: Metadata expiration
checklist.description: Uses WeatherMetadata.expirationDate for cache freshness rather than a fixed 10-minute or arbitrary staleness interval.

checklist.name: Attribution placement
checklist.description: Requires Apple Weather attribution where WeatherKit data appears, not only in a separate settings screen.

checklist.name: Attribution assets
checklist.description: Mentions WeatherService.attribution, the Apple Weather mark light/dark variants or legalPageURL/legalAttributionText.

checklist.name: Alert details
checklist.description: States WeatherAlert.detailsURL is non-optional and should be linked from alert UI for detail/attribution.

checklist.name: Optional alert region
checklist.description: Treats WeatherAlert.region as optional and uses a nil-safe fallback or omission.

checklist.name: Availability scope
checklist.description: Limits WeatherAvailability to alert and minute forecast availability instead of treating it as a broad support matrix.

checklist.name: Project setup
checklist.description: Mentions WeatherKit capability/App ID setup and location permission when device location is used.

checklist.name: Measurement formatting
checklist.description: Recommends locale-aware Measurement formatting for temperature instead of hardcoded weather strings.
